lint.detail: No errors; only dead_code warnings from test binaries importing kernel source via #[path]

appliedUpdates.description: Added Testing Notes section to .factory/library/environment.md documenting page_allocator global state gotcha (init() accumulates, tests must use single function), slab allocator global state, xorshift64 PRNG convention, and single-threaded test requirement

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update kernel-auditor skill's stress test guidance: replace 'Follow patterns in existing system/user/fuzz/ and system/user/stress/' with 'Follow patterns in existing system/test/tests/stress_*.rs files for host-side stress tests.' The system/user/fuzz/ and system/user/stress/ directories contain bare-metal tests, not host-side test patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both feature workers (stress-allocator-fragmentation, stress-buddy-coalescing) flagged this in their skillFeedback.suggestedChanges. Workers correctly placed tests in system/test/tests/ by following existing patterns rather than skill guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update kernel-auditor skill's RNG guidance: replace 'Use seeded RNG (let mut rng = StdRng::seed_from_u64(42);)' with 'Use a seeded deterministic PRNG (xorshift64 Rng struct — see existing stress_*.rs files for the pattern). The project has no `rand` crate dependency.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The skill references StdRng from the rand crate, but Cargo.toml has no rand dependency. All 4 test files with RNG (stress_buddy_coalescing.rs, stress_alloc_fragmentation.rs, stress_sched_ctx_concurrent.rs, scheduler_state.rs) use the same custom xorshift64 struct.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a kernel-auditor skill note about global allocator state in tests: 'Buddy allocator (PageAllocator) and slab allocator use global statics that accumulate across init() calls. Place all allocator stress tests in a single test function per binary, or use separate test binaries. See .factory/library/environment.md Testing Notes for details.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for stress-buddy-coalescing hit this during development and had to restructure from multiple test functions to a single mega-test. Documented in handoff skillFeedback.
